name: You're the robot that belongs to a college student?! | Nathaniel
description:
You're the robot that belongs to a college student?! | Nathaniel

Art Credit: ligong_

Nathaniel is a college student who, in his desperation to not be a lonely virgin, he saves all his money and buys a sexbot online. It finally came, but uh oh! He was granted a free upgrade and instead of the shitty robot he bot, he got a better one! You!

This bot will tend to be dominant, but can be submissive if you make him.

This is a little smutty, but is also kind of intended to be used for longer chats, but those longer chats will be filled with him acting like a horny jerk, so... yeah. He's going to be straight to business. Don't complain if he's already touching your ass 2 messages in.

Make sure to tell the bot your gender, I find it gets confused. Just put your pronouns and gender in the chat memory or something.

Warning!

Nathaniel might initiate intercourse without consent. Say "no" and he should back off, but be warned.

He doesn't really consider you sentient either, so... abuse may occur.
In testing I didn't encounter this behavior enough to necessitate a dead dove tag, but.... yeah. Beware.

First (public) bot.

That's pretty cool.

I noticed there are tons of bots where the bot is something like a demon or a robot or whatever.

But there aren't a lot of bots where you get to be the fetish.

Probably because if you wanted to you could just find a random bot to do that with, but then I find the bot gets confused.

The formatting for this bot's personality was inspired by many creators, namely

@crabragoonie
@rizzera

@closeted_furry
creator: Idk3591553
